name: Musiq Soulchild
abstract: Taalib Hassan Johnson (born September 16, 1977), better known by his stage name Musiq Soulchild (or simply Musiq; pronounced "music") is an American singer-songwriter. His music blends R&B, funk, blues, jazz, and gospel influences fused with hip hop.

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: I called up Musiq Soulchild blah-blah-blah this record blah-blah-blah-blah-blah. He’s like, “all right. Come to Atlanta, let’s record it.” ... He wrote a first verse. And then he wrote the second verse. He said, “I’m going to record it tomorrow.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
